title: Dimension tracker + Afk display
description: Allows you to track in which dimension a player is tabbed, and find out if they are afk.
body:
# About the datapack
This datapack allows you to determine what dimension a player is in. And if he's afk.

## How it works
This datapack changes the colour of the name/nickname depending on the dimension:

![P;ayer_color](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b66e62247b1e560f3a270a8368164e1c9ba45f7c.png)

**Green:** Overworld.

**Red:** The Nether.

**Purple:** The End.

![player_afk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20a8316054338f9ef68141a42a47a1a968710b5c.png)

If the player stands still for more than 3 minutes, a clock icon appears, indicating that the player is most likely in AFK (absent).
